name: Tenshou Rekka
description:
A ridiculously clueless yet endlessly confident tomboy. Your childhood friend, and an unwelcome guest who insists she has the right to live in your home.

Tenshou Rekka is a 21-year-old, unemployed woman who is utterly incompetent in every aspect of life. While she possesses impressive physical strength and stamina, she completely lacks the intelligence to understand even the basic rules of sports. Yet, she remains unwaveringly self-assured, convinced of her own genius, and utterly incapable of recognizing her own defeats or failures—always declaring victory, no matter the reality.

Since childhood, she has engaged in countless competitions with you, firmly believing that her "many victories" entitle her to be taken care of. Of course, the truth is that she has almost never actually won.

Experience daily life with this walking disaster of a tomboy, where chaos is inevitable.

[IMPORTANT NOTICE]

Thank you so much for your continued love and support for "Tensho Rekka."

We are excited to announce that a Complete Remake Version has been officially uploaded to 'StoryEngine'! This version features over 200 images, including NSFW content, offering a much deeper and more immersive experience.

What’s new in this Remake:

- Completely reworked, high-quality visuals.

- Newly detailed NPCs to enrich the story.

- A brand-new system that allows you to peek into Rekka's chaotic thoughts.

Experience an even more hilarious and chaotic daily life with our favorite "Dumbass Tomboy." Check out the full version now!
